title: fix(docs): restore CLI/auth/errors sections, dedupe BYOP
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A cleaner map to the hive
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the API documentation! The CLI, Authentication, and Errors sections are back where they belong, and we've cleared out some duplicated Bring Your Own Pollen content.
gist.summary: Restored missing CLI, Authentication, and Errors sections to the OpenAPI documentation and removed duplicated Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) content.
gist.impact: Developers will find a cleaner, more organized API reference with all the necessary authentication and error handling details restored.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about cleaning up documentation, organizing, and removing duplicates. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee organizing a bookshelf or reading a clean, glowing map/scroll. The Nomnom creature could be eating the 'duplicate' pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing glowing scrolls and books on a wooden shelf in a warm library. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of duplicate papers nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
